description_long: This object is a sculptural representation of a large bird, resembling an ostrich or emu, with exaggerated and stylized features. The body is bulky and textured, with a ruffled, almost floral arrangement of metallic-looking feathers, giving it a dramatic and artistic appearance. The long, slender neck and legs are thin and wiry, contrasting with the voluminous body, and the feet are wide and webbed, splayed out in an expressive manner. The head is small relative to the body, with a slightly open beak and a subtle, inquisitive expression. The surface appears to be made of metal, with a rough, matte finish and a mix of gray, silver, and hints of purple and brown tones. The overall form is whimsical and abstract, suggesting a decorative or artistic installation suitable for urban parks or public spaces.
description: A large, stylized metal bird sculpture with a ruffled, textured body, long thin legs, and webbed feet, finished in gray and metallic hues. The design is whimsical and abstract, with a dramatic, artistic presence.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bird's elongated neck, ruffled body, and one splayed webbed foot clearly visible.
description_view_1: Frontal view highlighting the symmetrical, ruffled body, both long legs, and wide webbed feet facing forward.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the head turned, displaying the textured body and both feet from a different angle.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the rounded, ruffled back and the alignment of the long legs and webbed feet.
attribute_plumage_pattern: ruffled and mottled, with irregular, layered feather-like textures
